title: Session artifact loader with retry and progress tracking
purpose: Loads all session artifacts (diagrams, documents, designs, spreadsheets, snippets) in parallel with retry logic and progress events for UI feedback.
module_context: Exports loading functions for each artifact type, a parallel loader for all artifacts, progress event handling, and retry utilities with exponential backoff.

steps.content: Create a custom event with the loading progress details.
Dispatch the custom event to the window for UI listeners.
Attempt to execute the provided promise-returning function.
IF the function succeeds, return its resolved value immediately.
IF the function fails, increment the attempt counter and delay before retrying.
IF the maximum retry attempts are exceeded, re-throw the last error.
Attempt to load diagrams from the API with retry logic.
IF successful, store the diagrams in the session store.
IF successful, dispatch a progress event indicating artifact loading completion.
IF loading fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF loading fails, set an empty array in the session store and return an empty array.
Attempt to load documents from the API with retry logic.
IF successful, store the documents in the session store.
IF successful, dispatch a progress event indicating artifact loading completion.
IF loading fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF loading fails, set an empty array in the session store and return an empty array.
Attempt to load designs from the API with retry logic.
IF successful, store the designs in the session store.
IF successful, dispatch a progress event indicating artifact loading completion.
IF loading fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF loading fails, set an empty array in the session store and return an empty array.
Attempt to load spreadsheets from the API with retry logic.
IF successful, store the spreadsheets in the session store.
IF successful, dispatch a progress event indicating artifact loading completion.
IF loading fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF loading fails, set an empty array in the session store and return an empty array.
Attempt to load snippets from the API with retry logic.
IF successful, store the snippets in the session store.
IF successful, dispatch a progress event indicating artifact loading completion.
IF loading fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF loading fails, set an empty array in the session store and return an empty array.

methods.name: loadAllArtifacts
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<{ totalArtifacts: number; diagrams: Diagram[]; documents: Document[]; designs: Design[]; spreadsheets: Spreadsheet[]; snippets: Snippet[] }>

steps.content: Dispatch a start progress event to indicate loading has begun.
Load all artifact types in parallel for optimal performance.
IF all loads succeed, calculate the total number of loaded artifacts.
IF all loads succeed, dispatch a complete progress event with the total count.
IF any load fails, log the error and dispatch an error progress event.
IF any load fails, return the artifacts that were successfully loaded.
Register a custom event listener for the loading progress event.
When the event fires, pass the event details to the provided callback function.
Return a cleanup function that removes the event listener when called.
